leadText: Dusty Bowl (Japanese: 砂塵の窪地 Sandstorm Pit) is a part of the Wild Area in the Galar region, located in the center of the northern portion of the Wild Area. It connects to the Stony Wilderness to its south, the Hammerlocke Hills to its northeast, and the Giant's Mirror to its east. If the player passes under the stone arch in Dusty Bowl with a Galarian Yamask that has taken at least 49 HP in damage from attacks without fainting, it will evolve into Runerigus.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games TM73 ( Cross Poison ) On the island in the northwest (requires Rotom Bike Water Mode) Sw Sh Sun Stone At the northwest end of the giant "bridge" of rock, behind the small pillar Sw Sh Moon Stone In the northeast, where a large spine of rock meets the north wall Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Unless otherwise stated, hidden items in the Wild Area regenerate every day. In many of these cases, they can also regenerate as different items. Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance). Item Location Games Poké Ball Under the flying Pokemon east of the southernmost den Sw Sh Great Ball Ultra Ball Revive In the southwest, by the rock east of the north end of the "tunnel" of leaning rocks Sw Sh Max Revive Rare Bone In the northwest, by the stand of dead trees on the southeast corner of the field of grass along the wall Sw Sh Rare Bone In the northwest, by the stand of dead trees on the west side of the field of grass along the wall Sw Sh Rare Bone In the northwest, by the stand of dead trees between the two fields of grass nearest the large pond Sw Sh Fossilized Bird In the northwest, by the rock south of the ponds; Reason: Possible locations of Hikers and Fishers Main article: Wild Area → 100-Watt gifts Hikers and Fishers may appear throughout the Dusty Bowl to offer the player a random item for 100 Watts .
